text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure you'll be all right? Ever since you
were little, you've been flubb'n stuff when it
matters most.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mooom! I'll be fine! I'm not a kid anymore, okay?

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Hehe, yes, I know, I know. You're no longer
a child... You're a stupendous Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mom...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe! That's right! Keep your eyes on me and you're gonna see even more stupendous running!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So, anyway! I was hoping you could train me to
nab the win when things really come down to the
wire!
choice_data_list: You got it! Let's do this!

text_block_list.text:
Hey, before you start training, un momento, por
favor!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: E-El?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
As I'm sure you know, I'm going to become the
strongest Umamusume in the world!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But if I wanna do that, I'll have to defeat the one
who made me taste bitter defeat—and that's you,
Spe!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I was thinking I could be your
training partner!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's no point in beating you if you're all weak
and slow, after all.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So it'll be better for both of us if you get even
stronger!
Now, now, El. ♪ It's not fair to cut in line.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You're not the only one seeking a rematch with
Spe, you know?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Pardon me, but would you mind my joining you?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There are few feats more impressive than besting
the best racer in Japan, you see.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa, looks like we all have the same idea.
But please, don't let me interrupt your
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I could get a lot more out of this by just
listening from the sidelines anyway. ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You guys...
choice_data_list: Well, Spe? What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(It's thanks to everyone here that I was able to
get stronger.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(I was capable of moving forward because I had
them.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(And with them by my side, I'm sure I'll be able to
reach even greater heights!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, let's all run together!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I want to keep running with you guys forever and
ever. And I think that's because...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I finally have what I longed for and ran for—the
title of best racer in all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Sounds like you're already confident you'll
win. Or at the very least, that you're ready for a
fight.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's just hope you don't regret
underestimating us.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Heh heh heh... That is just what I was hoping to hear! Today, you are going to see a toootally different side to us!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer, could you count down for us, please?
choice_data_list: Sure! On your marks... Get set... Go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At my signal, Special Week and her rivals start
tearing down the track together.
